The species Telekia speciosa is further divided into several subspecies based on geographical distribution and morphological characteristics. Telekia speciosa is a perennial plant that grows up to 3-5 feet in height, producing large, showy flowers in shades of pink and purple. The classification of Telekia speciosa is also supported by molecular phylogenetic studies, which confirm its position within the family Asteraceae.
